line: Squee see dem comin' from de port side! Big ones!
Dere's tree of dem, maybe four! Comin' fast!
Dem big ones comin' behind us! Squee see 'em!
Flyers! We gots flyers comin' in from de top!
Dere's sumpthing inna water. Squee don't like it.
Look out! Dat one's got a pointy stick bigger den Squee!
Squee count twelve. No, tirteen. Lots. Too many.
Dey comin' round de left side! De left! No, de other left!
Dat big fella's pointing right at Squee. Squee don't like dat at all.
Cavalry! Dere's cavalry! Squee hate cavalry!
Dem sneaky ones is trying to flank us. Squee sees ya! Squee sees ya!
Dat thing got wings AND teeth. Squee callin' it now, dat's de worst kind.
More comin' up de hill! Why always up de hill?
Squee spot de big captain fella. He's pointing at us. Dat's bad.
Dey got casters in de back! Squee see de glowy hands!
Reinforcements comin' in from de east! East! Or maybe dat's west. De sun side!
One of dem big spider tings just disappeared. Dat means it's gonna reappear somewhere bad.
Dey comin' from everywhere! Who let dem get everywhere?!
Dem ones wit de shields is up front! Hard ones first, Squee always says!
Squee see de banner! Dat's de fancy general banner! Dey got a fancy general!
Dey got archers! Duck! Why Squee always gotta say duck?!
Sumpthing's moving under de ship. Squee real nervous about what's under de ship.
De whole front line just exploded and now dere's twice as many behind it. Dat ain't right.
Dat one's been hit three times and still comin'. Squee respectful but also very alarmed.
Dey got a siege engine! A siege engine! Who brings a siege engine?!
Looks like de whole army, but Squee could be wrong. Squee is not wrong.
Dere's a fella wit a very big axe headin' straight for dis spot. Squee's spot.
Flank attack! Dey flanking us! Squee told ya dey'd flank!
Seven o'clock! Dey comin' in at seven o'clock! Or eight. Somewhere back-left!
Dat dragon circling up top? Yeah, dat's lookin' at us.
De whole ridge just lit up wit enemy torches. Squee counts... a lot of torches.
Dey sendin' de big ones first dis time. Smart. Squee hate when dey smart.
Wave after wave after wave. Who teaches dese people tactics?!
Squee see sumpthing glowing behind dat hill. Nuthing good ever glows behind a hill.
Dem got hooks and chains! Squee HATE de hooks and chains!
Dere's a giant. Squee just thought ya should know dere's a giant.
Dat's an ambush. Squee said it first. Ambush.
Dey got more of dem ting-a-majigs dat shoot fire. FIRE ONES!
Squee counting... five hundred? Six? Dis ain't good for Squee.
Dey got us surrounded. Dat's actually easier for de cannon, Squee suppose.
BOOM! Dat's one for Squee! Right in de middle!
Squee load, Squee aim, Squee fire. Simple. Why everyone make it hard?
De tail gun is warm and ready! Squee's got de tail gun!
Hold on. Hold on. HOLD ON. Now! BOOM!
Prow gun ready! Squee swiveled it and everything!
Squee shoot de butt. Dat's what Squee always shoot first.
Dat shot wuz perfect. Perfect. Squee just wanna say dat out loud.
Reloading! Give Squee two seconds! Squee only got two hands!
De stern gun ain't gonna aim itself! Squee ON IT!
Squee used de special powder dis time. De special powder.
Squee see a whole column of dem and Squee just LOVE a whole column.
Tree ships in de water? One shot might get two if Squee clever. Squee is clever.
Squee don't miss. Squee NEVER miss. Dat one wuz a warning shot.
Adjusting de elevation! Squee know about elevation!
De gun is HOT. Squee don't care, Squee keep shootin'.
Load de chain shot! CHAIN SHOT! Squee's favorite!
FIRE! FIRE! FIRE! All guns at once, Squee don't care who's listenin'!
Squee line it up just right. BOOM. Dere it go.
Dat's de third direct hit in a row. Squee keeping track.
Squee was born to operate dis gun. Squee gonna say dat every time.
Grapeshot! Load de grapeshot! Dey too close for de big balls!
BOOM. And BOOM. And for good measure, BOOM.
Squee wait for de wind to shift. Den fire. Dat's seamanship, dat is.
De gun don't like Squee rushin'. Squee know dis. Squee take de half-second.
Squee switch to de port gun since de starboard one's too hot. Squee adaptable.
Dis here powder ain't great but Squee make it work. BOOM. Worked.
Squee fires for effect! Dat's de military term! SQUEE KNOWS DE TERMS!
Dat broadside wuz Squee's idea. Everybody act like dey didn't hear Squee say broadside.
Canister round! Squee loadin' canister! Stand by!
De fuse is lit, everybody step BACK, Squee said BACK!
Squee led dat shot perfectly. De target flew right into it. Beautiful.
Last ball in de locker! Make it count! BOOM! It counted!
Squee fire dat gun one-handed if Squee gotta. Squee DON'T GOTTA but Squee could.
Hot shot! Squee heated de ball first! Dis is gonna be great!
BOOM goes de cannon. CRASH goes de enemy. DAT'S HOW YA DO IT.
De aim wuz Squee's. De shot wuz Squee's. De glory is also Squee's.
Squee depress de barrel a little. Dere. Now Squee fire. PERFECT.
Dat wuz a ranging shot. Squee wuz adjusting. De next one hits. Dere. Hit.
Squee don't got many shots left so Squee makin' dem all count. BOOM. Count dat.
Squee fire from de hip! De cannon hip! Squee don't know de right word!
Dey shootin' AT Squee! Squee is not a TARGET!
Dat bolt went right past Squee's ear! SQUEE'S GOOD EAR!
Why is everybody always tryin' to kill Squee?! Squee just tryin' to kill dem!
Squee been shot at by better people den you and Squee's still here!
Arrow! ARROW! It's in de wall two inches from Squee's head! TWO INCHES!
If dese guys hit Squee, Squee is gonna be so mad.
Squee gettin' shot at and STILL outperformin' everyone else. Just so you know.
De whole starboard side just got peppered! Squee included! Squee not happy!
Dey know where de gun crew is! Dey aiming for us! BECAUSE OF SQUEE'S GOOD SHOOTING!
Squee crouch down and fire at de same time. Squee is a professional.
Dat fireball came close. Too close. Squee's eyebrows is gone again.
Dey concentrating fire on dis position! Squee's position! Squee's OWN position!
Squee don't flinch. Squee just blink because of de smoke. Dat's different.
Every time Squee stick de head up, dey shoot at it! It's like dey KNOW!
Squee take de graze. It's fine. Squee barely feels it. Squee feels it a lot actually.
Dis is a very dangerous place to be right now and Squee is in dis place!
De shots come faster when Squee hits more. Dis don't seem fair.
DUCK! Squee duck! Why nobody else duck when Squee duck?!
If Squee gets hit ONE more time, Squee is gonna be very annoyed and shoot extra hard.
Dey pickin' off de gun crew one by one! Squee is de last gun crew!
Squee keep firin' even though dey keep shootin'! Dat's HEROISM, dat is!
Dat bolt grazed Squee's tail! Squee's TAIL! Of all de parts to hit!
Squee behind dis shield and still fillin' scared. Dis shield ain't enough shield.
Dere's so much incoming fire Squee can't see de targets! Dat ain't fair tactics!
Squee know dey aiming for de gun. Squee is de gun. Dis is a problem.
Just one more shot before Squee takes cover. BOOM. Okay, takin' cover now.
Squee bleed a little but Squee don't stop. Squee is de hero of Mercadia.
Dey targeted Squee specifically. Squee is famous. Dis is de price of fame.
Magic bolt! Magic bolt! Squee does NOT get paid enough for magic bolts!
Dat sniper keeps finding Squee! HOW?! Squee is small! Squee is VERY SMALL!
De whole deck is on fire around Squee! Squee still firin'! Call de historians!
Squee's gun position is de most dangerous spot on de whole ship. Dis is also de best spot.
Splinters everywhere! Squee got splinters in places Squee didn't know could get splinters!
If Squee gotta keep shootin' under DIS much fire, Squee want a bigger title after.
Dey keep shootin' and Squee keep not dying. Squee quite good at dat part.
Squee notice de enemy stopped shootin' for a second. Squee used dat second to shoot back twice.
Every time Squee expose de head to aim, somethin' whizzes past it. De head is important!
Dis don't hurt. Squee just breathin' heavy because of de exercise.
ANOTHER fireball! Where dey getting all dese fireballs?! Did someone give dem a deal?!
Squee take cover behind de anchor. De anchor is good cover. Squee recommend it.
Hey! Watch where ya swingin' dat sword! Squee's on your SIDE!
Squee ain't sayin' you slow, Squee just sayin' Squee already handled dat while you wuz still thinking.
Nice swing! But Squee's cannon shot wuz nicer. Just sayin'.
You gonna use dat blade or just look impressive wit it?
Squee and you gonna have words after dis about who gets credit for dat kill.
Squee cover de left, you cover de right, we sort out who's tougher later!
Dat big fella is all yours. Squee ain't gettin' near dat big fella. Squee supportin' you from here.
Oh sure, let Squee handle de scary part, dat's fine, everybody do dat!
You gots nerve, tellin' Squee what's what, Mister Commander Man! ...Okay Squee doin' it.
Less talkin', more shooting! Squee said it first!
Squee hold dis flank. You go do de heroic stuff. Squee's heroic stuff is here.
Karn, if you step on Squee one more time, Squee and you gonna have a real problem!
Gerrard always get de glory and Squee get de splinters. It's a pattern.
Squee would help ya up, but Squee busy shootin'. You understand.
Dat wuz a team effort. Squee did most of it, but it wuz a team.
Stop bleedin' on Squee's gun station! Squee just got dat cleaned up!
You lucky Squee got your back. You very, very lucky.
Squee told dem dey wuz standing in de wrong spot. Squee did warn dem.
Less fancy magic, more practical goblin. Dat's Squee's philosophy.
Squee appreciate de backup, but Squee wuz handlin' it. Just for de record.
Hey Multani! Dem tree branches is in Squee's line of fire! Move de branches!
Squee don't need orders. Squee see what needs doing and Squee does it. Mostly.
You owe Squee for dat one. Write it down somewhere.
Squee and you together? Dey should be scared. Dey IS scared. Look at dem run.
Squee don't care who gets de kill as long as Squee gets de tally. Squee keeping de tally.
Next time you run into trouble, Squee's rate is very reasonable. Very reasonable.
Dat's what Squee's here for! To do de dangerous parts while everybody else looks nice!
Squee don't work for praise. But a little praise would be fine right now. Just a little.
Good thing Squee here. Nobody give Squee credit for bein' de good thing but good thing Squee here.
Haha! Squee and you make a good team today! Don't let it go to your head.
Dis battle got Squee's fingerprints all over it. De successful parts, dat is.
You takin' de right side? Fine. Squee take de left. Squee already done wit de left. Now Squee take de right too.
Squee covered ya. Now Squee covered ya again. Squee count dis as two favors.
You call dat a battle cry?! Squee got a better battle cry! SQUEEEE!
Squee don't say nuthing about your technique. Squee just say Squee's technique works.
Next round's on you. Squee carried dis round.
Squee's gonna remember dat you helped, even though Squee didn't need it.
Back to back! Like de old days! When wuz de old days? Doesn't matter! Back to back!
Dis is de part where Squee saves de day and you tell de story. Squee knows how it goes.
Everybody get down! Squee got a clear shot! Everybody DOWN!
Dat's one! Squee got one! Write it down!
Two. Squee gots two. Squee is on a roll.
Squee count dat as a kill even if it wuz technically a disable. It went down.
Dat makes five! Five for Squee today! Any other day dat would be a lot!
SQUEE GETS DE KILL! Squee got it! Dat's Squee's kill!
Squee tallying up. Nine kills. Maybe ten. One of dem might come back but Squee count it anyway.
Don't nobody take dat one! Dat one is SQUEE'S!
Squee got de captain! Squee specifically targeted de captain! Dat should count for two!
Dat's twelve. Squee stop countin' on fingers and start countin' on toes.
Look at dat! Direct hit on de flag carrier! Very symbolic, very satisfying!
One shot, two of dem. Squee don't take credit for de second one officially but Squee take it unofficially.
Squee lost count. Squee start over. One! Dat's one again. Startin' fresh.
Dat one tried to run. Squee still got it. You can't outrun Squee's cannon.
De big one went down first. Squee always take de big ones first. Good practice.
Squee keep a mental list. De mental list is long today. Very long. Very satisfying.
Dat's Squee's personal record for dis engagement. Previous record wuz less. Much less.
Ship goes down, Squee counts de whole ship as one kill. Squee's rules, Squee's tally.
Fifteen. Squee said fifteen. Don't argue wit Squee's count.
Dat fell right off de deck. Squee almost feel bad about dat one. Almost.
Squee is ahead of Gerrard today. Squee keeping track of dat too.
ANOTHER ONE! Squee is UNSTOPPABLE today!
De one dat got away don't count. Squee still counts it though because Squee hurt it first.
Squee's confirmed kills is more den Squee got fingers and toes combined. Squee doin' math.
Dat archer up in de tower? Squee got dat. Long shot. Squee proud of dat one.
Double kill. Squee call it a double kill. DOUBLE KILL FOR SQUEE!
Dat ain't fair. Squee had dat one lined up and someone else got it. Squee still counts it.
After dis battle, Squee want some kind of official recognition. A medal. Squee want a medal.
Squee takes down de siege engine! DE SIEGE ENGINE! Dat's gotta count for twenty!
Plus dat one from earlier dat Squee forgot to count. Make it eighteen total now.
Squee just scored what dey'd call a hat-trick if dis wuz a sporting event. It's not. It's a battle. But still.
Every single thing Squee aimed at, Squee hit. Squee's just gonna say dat for de record.
Squee lost count again at forty. Let's call it fifty and move on.
All dat trainin' Squee give hisself wuz worth it today.
Dat's de third cavalry charge Squee broke up single-handedly. Squee note dis for de historians.
Dis battle is going in Squee's favor. Dat mean dis battle is going in everyone's favor, by coincidence.
Squee get de most kills. Den Squee get de credit. Den everybody happy. Dis is Squee's plan.
Ooh, dat wuz a satisfying hit. Squee not ashamed to admit dat wuz satisfying.
De enemy general is down! Squee don't know who got him but Squee claiming it!
Squee gonna need a bigger tally sheet after today.
For Squee's personal record? Dis is de best day. Squee said it. BEST DAY.
Aim for de rigging first! Take away dere mobility!
Don't shoot de deck, shoot de waterline! You want it to sink or you want it to burn? Shoot de waterline!
Dey using de trees as cover. Cut down de trees. Or just shoot through de trees.
If you split dem up, dey easier to pick off. Get 'em running in different directions!
Squee know what dey doin'. Dey trying to draw de fire. Don't follow de noise!
De ground is wet over dere. Heavy cavalry gonna slip on wet ground. Squee just sayin'.
Shoot de guy wit de horn first. No horn, no signals. No signals, dey confused.
Dey got a pattern. Every two minutes dey send another wave. Wait for de gap!
De wind shifted. Adjust all fire to port by a little bit. Trust Squee on dis.
If we pull back here, dey have to funnel through dat gap. Den it's easy shots.
Dey running low on arrows. Squee counted de volleys. Maybe two, tree more salvos left in dem.
Don't bunch up! You bunch up, one fireball gets tree of ya! Spread out!
De commander's in de rear. Take out de commanders and de rest don't know what to do.
Use de smoke! De smoke is cover! Move through de smoke!
Dey expect us to charge. Squee say we don't charge. We make dem come to us.
One gun on each target. Two guns on de big target. Squee allocating firepower!
Dey crossing de bridge single file. Oh, dis is beautiful. Dis is a beautiful opportunity.
If you hold de high ground you win. Squee knows dis. Get to de high ground!
Wait until dey fully committed to de charge BEFORE you shoot. Let dem get close. THEN shoot. Trust Squee.
Squee notice dey rotating de shields every minute. Time de rotation. Hit between de rotations.
De mages in de back gotta die first. De big soldiers is nuthing without de mages.
Dat officer is giving all de hand signals. Cut off de hand signals.
If we feint left and push right, dey over-compensate and we exploit de gap. SQUEE KNOW TACTICS.
Dey expect de cannons. Dey don't expect Squee personally charging. Use dat surprise.
De supply lines is back behind dat ridge. Cut de supply lines and dey starve out in tree days.
Squee see what dey doin'. Classic pincer. Classic. Squee read about it in a book once. Real book.
Fire into de formation, not at de edges. De edges scatter. De formation breaks.
Low tide means de shoals is exposed. Squee steer around de shoals but dey don't know about de shoals.
Squee just solved dis battle in Squee's head. Squee gonna execute de plan now. Please don't interfere.
Night attack. Dey expect us to rest at night. Dat's why we attack at night.
Dere's a weak point in dat wall right dere. See where de stones is different? RIGHT DERE.
Lure dem into de swamp and den fire from de other side. De swamp slows dem down.
Squee don't understand why nobody listen to Squee before de battle. Squee correct every single time.
Two waves: first wave draws de fire, second wave hits while dey reloading. Classic. Effective. Squee's version.
Squee's analysis: dey got more numbers but we got better position. Position wins. Squee sure of dis.
Concentrate fire on one side of de formation. Break one side. Whole thing collapses like a bad deck.
Dey gonna charge when de drum beats get faster. Listen for de fast drums. DERE'S DE FAST DRUMS.
Squee say we hold dis position until de others get around behind dem. Perfect trap. Perfect.
Dat magic barrier got a gap at de bottom. Shoot low. DE BOTTOM.
Squee spot de reload pattern on dat catapult. It's every forty seconds. Squee timed it. Move on forty one.
Dat one missed Squee by de width of Squee's hand! DAT ONE!
WHOOOOA! Squee felt de heat on dat one! De heat!
Squee's hat is gone. De hat is gone. Squee liked dat hat.
DAT COULD'A BEEN SQUEE! Right where Squee wuz standing three seconds ago!
Squee hit de deck! Squee already back up! Squee up first! ...Squee definitely up first.
Big explosion right next to Squee! Squee's ears is ringing! WHAT?! WHAT DID YOU SAY?!
Dat one almost took de arm off! De arm Squee needs for shootin'!
KABOOM! Dis ship still in one piece?! CHECK! CHECK IF WE'S IN ONE PIECE!
De mast came down right behind Squee! RIGHT BEHIND! Less dan a foot!
Squee blink and everything is on fire. Squee was not prepared for everything to be on fire.
Dat hit de magazine on THEIR ship! RUN FROM DE BLAST! BIG BLAST COMIN'!
OH! OH! OH! VERY CLOSE! TOO CLOSE! MUCH TOO CLOSE FOR SQUEE!
Squee fly through de air and land on Squee's feet. Squee call dat graceful. Mostly.
De whole wall just collapsed! Squee wuz right next to dat wall! SQUEE WUZ RIGHT NEXT TO IT!
Squee don't panic. Squee just run very fast in a controlled direction.
Squee took shrapnel in de backside. Squee don't talk about it but Squee acknowledge it happened.
Dat ship just blew up! De whole ship! Squee watching from a safe distance now!
EVERYBODY DOWN! Down down down DOWN! ...Okay. Everybody up. We good. We good.
Squee got debris in the eye. Squee is aiming with the other eye. Squee is fine.
De cannon behind Squee just exploded. Squee's cannon. SQUEE'S CANNON! DAT'S PERSONAL!
Squee wuz standing right dere and it wuz not standing Squee. Squee is philosophical about dat.
BOOM! And another BOOM! And Squee is somehow still talkin' about it! Amazing!
De blast knocked Squee clean off de gun platform. Squee climbed back up. Squee keeps climbing back up.
Squee don't know how dat missed. De laws of physics say dat shouldn't miss. Squee grateful anyway.
Dat lightning bolt split de deck right down de middle! Squee wuz on de RIGHT side, THANK SUMPTHING!
Squee's gun is smoking. Not because Squee fired it. It's SMOKING. Dis is a problem.
FIRE ON DE DECK! SQUEE SEE FIRE! SOMEBODY NOT SQUEE DEAL WIT DE FIRE!
Dat near miss shook de whole ship! Squee's teeth is rattling! SQUEE'S TEETH!
De concussion wave just knocked Squee's shot off by a little. THAT'S WHY SQUEE MISSED. CONCUSSION WAVE.
How many explosions today? Squee lost count of de explosions. Dat's too many explosions.
Squee's gonna have nightmares about dat one. Big ball of fire, very loud. Very, very loud.
Don't panic! ...Squee panicking a little. Just on de inside.
Squee wuz half a second from being remembered as a tragic hero. Half a second.
Dat shot skipped right off de water and still hit us! Who shoots like DAT?!
De whole forward section just went up! We got flooding AND fire! Both! At de same time!
Squee covered Squee's own head with Squee's own hands. Don't judge Squee for dat. Anyone would.
KABOOM from somewhere! Squee is still here! Squee keepin' a list of how many times Squee should be dead!
Dat one took a chunk right out of de rail Squee wuz leaning on! DAT RAIL!
Squee dive behind de gun for cover. Den remember Squee is supposed to operate de gun. Den stand back up.
Squee no scared. Squee just... crouching for ergonomic reasons.
Squee ain't doin' dat. ...Squee doin' it. Squee just wanted you to know Squee ain't happy about it.
Dat's a terrible order and Squee objects to it officially. Now Squee going to follow it anyway.
You want Squee to go WHERE? Squee said no. ...Squee's going. But Squee said no first.
Squee don't take orders from no fancy commander man. ...Well Squee take dis one. Dis once.
Dat's a suicide mission and Squee ain't on a suicide mission. ...Squee is apparently on de suicide mission.
No. Absolutely no. Not a chance. ...Fine. FINE. Squee going. SQUEE GOING.
Squee wuz NOT asked, Squee wuz told, and dere's a difference. But Squee doin' it.
De only reason Squee is doin' dis is because Squee thought of it first hisself. Independently.
If dis goes wrong, it wuz your idea. Squee is going on record wit dat.
Squee don't wanna hold de flank. ...Squee holding de flank. But Squee don't WANNA.
Dis wuz NOT in Squee's job description. Squee doin' it but it wuz NOT in de description.
You say charge and Squee say dat's foolish and den Squee charges. Dis is always how it goes.
Squee filing a formal complaint. De formal complaint is: dis is dangerous. Filed. Now Squee going in.
Retreat? Squee don't retreat! ...Okay, Squee retreat. But dis is strategic, not scared.
You put Squee on de most exposed gun and Squee gonna remember dat. But Squee man de gun.
Squee said no tree times. Four times. But de thing got done anyway. Squee did de thing.
Squee is going into de enemy camp alone and Squee wants everyone to understand Squee objected to dis.
Squee take de most dangerous job. Again. Because Squee is always somehow de one who ends up wit de most dangerous job.
Don't tell Squee what to do! ...Squee doing de thing you told Squee to do. Don't tell Squee's friends dat.
Squee hear de order. Squee hate de order. Squee carry out de order. Dis is Squee's life.
Squee go, but Squee go under protest. Squee want de word protest in any official record.
You crazy if you think Squee is gonna do dat. ....Squee's doing dat. Squee still think you crazy.
Dis is de dumbest plan Squee ever heard and Squee been on dis ship for a long time. Squee executing de plan.
Squee don't rush de gun emplacement solo. Dat is not how you do it. ...Squee's rushin' it.
If Squee does dis and lives, Squee gets a bigger share. Agreed? Not agreed. Squee going anyway.
Squee remembers when Squee could say no and it meant no. Dat wuz a good time.
Dis is not what heroes do. Heroes don't do dis. Squee is a hero and Squee is doing dis.
You point at de thing, Squee shoot de thing, even though Squee's idea wuz better.
Squee said maybe. Maybe became yes. Squee noting dat for future negotiation purposes.
Fine. FINE. Squee do it FINE. But Squee want an apology and a medal. Not now. Later.
Squee cross de open ground under fire. Someone who loves Squee better be watching and appreciating.
You give de worst orders. De absolute worst. Squee's following dem because Squee professional.
Squee know exactly what's gonna happen when Squee opens dat door. Squee opening it anyway. Told ya.
Squee want it known: Squee disagree wit dis plan from de start. Squee was AGAINST dis. AGAINST.
Squee don't rush in headfirst wit no plan! ...Squee's heading in. Squee's got half a plan.
Command says go left. Squee knows going right is better. Squee going left. Squee right about going right, by the way.
Squee take orders, not suggestions. Dis wuz a suggestion and Squee treated it like an order. You welcome.
Everyone else said it wuz too dangerous. So dey sent Squee. Squee has feelings about being de 'it's too dangerous' guy.
Squee on record as saying dis wuz a bad call. But here Squee is. Doing de bad call.
Squee know exactly who got blamed last time de plan went wrong. Not doing dat again. ...Squee doing it again.
Squee out of shot! Squee BITING now! DIS IS BITING TIME!
Squee throw de barrel! DE BARREL! TIMBER!
Squee don't got a weapon so Squee use de other guy as de weapon! Efficiency!
HEADBUTT! Squee know dat hurt dem more den it hurt Squee! PROBABLY!
Squee grab de loose cannonball and THROW IT! Squee very strong for Squee's size!
Squee hit it wit de powder ladle! De ladle is heavy! DAT COUNTS!
No gun, no sword, Squee got TEETH and dat's more den enough!
Squee picks up de rock. Squee throws de rock. Rock hits. Squee is an artillery unit.
DIS CHAIR IS A WEAPON NOW! EVERYTHING IS A WEAPON!
Squee wrap around de big fella's leg and don't let go! A goblin-sized anchor, dat is!
Squee use de rope! Whip it! CRACK! Dat worked better den expected!
Squee ram into dem feet-first like a tiny battering ram! A goblin battering ram!
Squee throw de tackle box! It hit three of dem! IT HIT THREE!
Squee got de marlinspike and it's sharp enough. SHARP ENOUGH FOR DIS!
Squee kick it right in de shin! De big ones always forget about de shins!
BITE BITE BITE! Squee biting through armor if Squee has to! GOBLIN TEETH IS STRONG!
Squee swing from de rigging and kick two of dem at once! Like a little kicking pendulum!
Squee pour de hot powder on dem! Not exactly de intended use but it work!
Squee scratch wit fingernails. Don't laugh. Squee's fingernails is sharp. Don't laugh.
Squee throw de sand in de eyes! Classic! Den de headbutt! CLASSIC GOBLIN COMBO!
Squee break off de gun sight and use it like a little club! Not ideal but workable!
Squee found a fish in de hold. Squee don't know what to do wit de fish but Squee got de fish ready.
De fish worked. Squee hit him wit de fish. It wuz very effective. Don't question it.
Squee roll under de big fella's legs! Nobody expect dat! NOBODY EVER EXPECT DE LEG ROLL!
Squee got de mop handle! It's long! Squee can reach more tings wit de mop handle!
Squee wrap de chains around de ankles! DOWN GOES DE BIG ONE! DOWN!
Squee bite de hand! Den de other hand! Den de ankle! Squee working through de extremities systematically!
Squee poke it in de eye wit a stick! A STICK! BASIC! EFFECTIVE!
Squee headbutt de kneecap! You ever been headbutted in de kneecap by a goblin? Unpleasant!
Squee find de bucket. Full bucket. DIS IS A WEAPON NOW. FULL BUCKET COMIN' ATCHA.
Squee take de lit torch and WAVE IT. Dey don't like de lit torch! Nobody like de lit torch!
Squee gnaw on de rope tying dem down! Like a little rescue rat! A heroic goblin rat!
Squee find a loose bolt and throw it. Small. Fast. Right in de face. Effective.
